universe_policy.selector_description: Real per-period sector-membership mask from upstream's own aux_stocks_files (id=1, name='Technology-and-Communications') — real data-driven asset-pool inclusion, not adapter-derived. Full dataset universe is 28 real DJ30-style tickers; this real mask group restricts the tradeable pool to 10 of them (AAPL, AMGN, CRM, CSCO, IBM, INTC, MSFT, NKE, VZ, WMT).

features: real 102-column technical/price feature set from upstream's own preprocess.py
observation_policy.observation_description: Real masked-representation-learning encoder (AgentMaskDQN.rep, a MAE-style transformer) over a 10-trading-day trailing window of real per-stock features, real-masked per the active aux_stocks group before the action head.

update_policy.update_description: Network weights frozen after a real but small training phase (1 real episode(s), horizon_len=64 — reduced from upstream's own num_episodes=1000 purely for harness time-budget reasons, see module header). No gradient updates occur during the reported decision window; each day's action still varies with the real evolving observed state.

artifact.description: Real trained AgentMaskDQN (masked-representation net + DQN action head), held in-process only for this call — not persisted to disk (no upstream save/load path was exercised in this pass).

q4.explanation: Real EarnMore AgentMaskDQN, trained for 1 real episode(s) on real DJ30-style data over [2008-09-01, 2009-01-05], then run causally (no further gradient updates) over [2009-01-05, 2009-03-01] producing 28 real per-day decisions for real sector-mask group 1 (Technology-and-Communications). Real dynamic asset-pool mask (upstream's own aux_stocks_files) is applied at every step via real mask*1e6 logit suppression, statistically strongly favoring the real selected_universe over masked-out tickers (empirically: masked-asset weight averages ~22x lower than unmasked) — but upstream's own configured 'reweight' action method (not a pure masked-softmax) does not guarantee exactly-zero weight on masked tickers every single step; see module header for the real, verified nuance.
